commit_message: docs(closeout): reconcile cognition for cluster POL-571

polaris_md_updates.change_summary: Corrected step count 13->14; replaced stale stepUpdateLinear/stepGenerateReport step references with current inline writeRunReport/updateLinearIssueAfterFinalize calls; documented stepStageArtifacts (5.75), sealed_head_sha PR-creation guard (POL-573), and QC convergence evidence surfacing (POL-575).
Added QcResult.headSha field description to types.ts bullet, linking it to finalize's sealed-reviewed-SHA evidence.

summary_md_updates.change_summary: Updated step count to 14; corrected Linear-update mechanism description; added bullets for artifact pre-staging (5.75), sealed HEAD SHA PR guard, and QC convergence evidence in run report/Linear comment.
Extended existing finalize/QC sentence in Current State to cover sealed HEAD SHA guard, QC convergence evidence surfacing, and .coderabbit.yaml review-scope policy.

evidence_summary: Reconciled POLARIS.md/SUMMARY.md for src/finalize and src/qc, plus the root src/SUMMARY.md, against the six completed children of POL-571 (seal local CodeRabbit QC to the exact PR head). Children POL-574 and POL-576 had already reconciled src/qc/POLARIS.md for the repair-loop terminal-outcome classification and .coderabbit.yaml review scope, so no further changes were needed there beyond adding the QcResult.headSha field note. The larger drift was in src/finalize docs, which still described a 13-step sequence and referenced stepUpdateLinear/stepGenerateReport as active steps.ts files; POL-573 and POL-575 changed index.ts to inline report regeneration and the Linear call directly and to add a sealed-HEAD-SHA guard before PR creation, and POL-572 split artifact staging out of stepCommit to run earlier (step 5.75) before completed-cluster QC. Docs now describe the 14-step sequence, the sealed-SHA PR guard, artifact pre-staging, and the new QC convergence evidence surfaced in the run report and Linear comment. Draft-stub POLARIS.md/SUMMARY.md files (src/qc/providers, src/finalize/steps) were left untouched since their file inventories remain accurate and they carry no factual claims contradicted by this cluster. No documentation ingestion, archival, or cognition-note archival was needed (no smartdocs candidates or pending cognition notes tied to this cluster). No blockers.
